        readBytesUntil

        write
      • write(s: SerialObj; buf: openArray[uint8]): csize_t

Bindings for the Arduino Serial (HardwareSerial) class.

The function list mirrors the official reference: https://docs.arduino.cc/language-reference/en/functions/communication/serial/ mapped against the local AVR core headers (1.8.8): HardwareSerial.h (begin/end/write/...), Stream.h (find/parse/read/Timeout), Print.h (print/println)

Intentionally not wrapped:

  • the write(int/long/...) helpers, which silently truncate to one byte in C++. write(uint8) covers them and makes out-of-range values an error
  • serialEvent(): only ever called by classic AVR cores (silent no-op on modern boards). poll available() at the top of loop: instead

Imports

wstring

Types

LookaheadMode {.importcpp: "LookaheadMode", header: "Arduino.h", size: 4.} = enum
  SKIP_ALL,                 ## all invalid characters are ignored (default)
  SKIP_NONE,                ## nothing is skipped; first waiting character must be valid
  SKIP_WHITESPACE            ## only tabs, spaces, line feeds & carriage returns are skipped
Lookahead options for parseInt() / parseFloat() (from Stream.h) 
SerialObj {.incompleteStruct, byref.} = object

Vars

Serial: SerialObj
Serial1: SerialObj
Serial2: SerialObj
Serial3: SerialObj

Lets

BIN: cint
DEC: cint
HEX: cint
OCT: cint
SERIAL_5E1: uint8
SERIAL_5E2: uint8

SERIAL_5N2: uint8

SERIAL_5O2: uint8

SERIAL_6N2: uint8

SERIAL_6O2: uint8

SERIAL_7E2: uint8

SERIAL_7N2: uint8
SERIAL_7O1: uint8
SERIAL_7O2: uint8
SERIAL_8E1: uint8
SERIAL_8E2: uint8
SERIAL_8N1: uint8
SERIAL_8N2: uint8
SERIAL_8O1: uint8
SERIAL_8O2: uint8

Consts

NO_IGNORE_CHAR = '\x01'
Default ignore for parseInt/parseFloat: a char not found in valid numeric fields (Stream.h #undefs its macro, so it's a Nim const here)

Procs

proc available(s: SerialObj): cint {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                     tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc `end`(s: SerialObj) {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                           forbids: [].}
proc find(s: SerialObj; target: char): bool {.importcpp: "#.find((char)#)",
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc find(s: SerialObj; target: cstring; length: csize_t): bool {.importcpp,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc findUntil(s: SerialObj; target: cstring; terminal: cstring): bool {.
    importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc flush(s: SerialObj) {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                           forbids: [].}
proc getTimeout(s: SerialObj): uint32 {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h",
                                        ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
technically from Stream.h 
proc isReady(s: SerialObj): bool {.importcpp: "((bool)(#))", ...raises: [],
                                   tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc parseFloat(s: SerialObj; lookahead: LookaheadMode = SKIP_ALL;
                ignore: char = NO_IGNORE_CHAR): cfloat {.
    importcpp: "#.parseFloat(#, (char)#)", header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc parseInt(s: SerialObj; lookahead: LookaheadMode = SKIP_ALL;
              ignore: char = NO_IGNORE_CHAR): int32 {.
    importcpp: "#.parseInt(#, (char)#)", header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc peek(s: SerialObj): cint {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc print(s: SerialObj; value: cdouble; digits: cint = 2): csize_t {.importcpp,
    discardable, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc print(s: SerialObj; value: char): csize_t {.importcpp: "#.print((char)#)",
    discardable, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc print(s: SerialObj; value: cstring): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc print(s: SerialObj; value: ptr FlashStringHelper): csize_t {.importcpp,
    discardable, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc print(s: SerialObj; value: String): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc println(s: SerialObj): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
                                      header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                      forbids: [].}
proc println(s: SerialObj; value: cdouble; digits: cint = 2): csize_t {.
    importcpp, discardable, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc println(s: SerialObj; value: char): csize_t {.
    importcpp: "#.println((char)#)", discardable, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc println(s: SerialObj; value: cstring): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc println(s: SerialObj; value: ptr FlashStringHelper): csize_t {.importcpp,
    discardable, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc println(s: SerialObj; value: String): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc read(s: SerialObj): cint {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the next incoming byte, or -1 if none is available 
proc readBytes(s: SerialObj; buffer: ptr uint8; length: csize_t): csize_t {.
    importcpp, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Reads up to length bytes into buffer; stops early on timeout (setTimeout). Returns the number of bytes placed in the buffer. 
proc readBytesUntil(s: SerialObj; terminator: char; buffer: ptr uint8;
                    length: csize_t): csize_t {.
    importcpp: "#.readBytesUntil((char)#, #, #)", header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
As readBytes, but also stops at terminator (which is discarded from the stream and not stored in the buffer) 
proc readString(s: SerialObj): String {.importcpp, header: "Arduino.h",
                                        ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Reads incoming serial data into a String until timeout (setTimeout) 
proc readStringUntil(s: SerialObj; terminator: char): String {.
    importcpp: "#.readStringUntil((char)#)", header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Reads incoming serial data into a String until terminator or timeout 
proc setTimeout(s: SerialObj; time: uint32 = 1000'u32) {.importcpp,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc write(s: SerialObj; buffer: ptr uint8; size: csize_t): csize_t {.importcpp,
    discardable, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc write(s: SerialObj; str: cstring): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc write(s: SerialObj; value: uint8): csize_t {.importcpp, discardable,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Templates

template print(s: SerialObj; value: SomeInteger; base: cint = 10): csize_t
template println(s: SerialObj; value: SomeInteger; base: cint = 10): csize_t
